## Describe Your Changes

Please provide a clear description of the modifications, components added, or bug fixes. If this is a new skeuomorphic component, explain the tactile behaviors, animations, and interactions you've designed.

## Linked Issue

Closes # (or N/A)

## Types of Changes

- [ ] New component (skeuomorphic React UI component)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] Feature enhancement (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update (improving guides, README, or playground docs)
- [ ] Other (please describe): 

## Visual Proof (Required for UI Changes)

Skeuomorphic interfaces are highly visual. Please upload a **GIF** or **video recording** showing the hover, click, active, and interactive states of your changes or new component.

*Add your media here (drag & drop in GitHub editor):*

## Checklist

Please check all that apply:

- [ ] I have read and followed the [Contributing Guidelines](https://github.com/k4ran909/Sora-UI/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My code follows the code style and guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have registered my component (if applicable) in:
  - [ ] `registry/index.ts`
  - [ ] `scripts/build-registry.js`
  - [ ] `components/preview-renderer.tsx`
- [ ] I have run local validation checks:
  - [ ] `npm run lint` completes without error.
  - [ ] `npm run build` completes successfully.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation / dynamic preview if necessary.
